'1ftTJ'f\.ft I MINISTRY OF COMMERCE AND INDUSTRY (Department of Commerce) N011FICA'IlON New Delhi, the 19th December, 2003 S.O. 1444(E).-In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 17 ofthe&port(Quality Control and Inspection) Act, 1963 (22 of 1963), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules to amend the Export of Honey (Quality Control, Inspection and Monitoring) Rules, 2002, namely:- I. (I) These rules may be called the Export of Honey (Quality Control, Inspection and Monitoring) (Amendment) Rules, 2003. (2) They shall come into force from the date of theirpublicationin the official gazette. 2 In the Export of Honey (Quality Control, Inspection and Monitoring) Rules, 2002, in rule 4, in sub-rule 4.1, after clause (7), the following clause shall be inserted :- "(8) The Council may seek the assistance of the Agricultural and Processed Food Products Export Development Authority (APEDA) or any other organisation approved by it for residue monitoring." [F. No. 6/3/2000-El&EP) MV.P.C.SASTRY, JtSecy. Note:- The principal notification was published vide S.0. 277(E) in the Gazette of India, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii), dated the 4th March, 2002. 3761 GI/2003 Printed by the Manager, Govt of India Press, Ring Road.
